cards.title: Graphs
cards.governance_note: Define nodes, edges, direction, weights, paths, and relationship evidence.

cards.title: Network Analysis
cards.governance_note: Document what centrality, reachability, and connectivity measures actually mean.

cards.title: Path Validity
cards.governance_note: Limit interpretation of long paths and require source, time, and context metadata.

cards.title: Relationship Overclaim
cards.governance_note: Audit causality, influence, authority, symmetry, and certainty implied by edges.
